tasks.label: kill rebuild run windows
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Name run_companion -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; flutter build windows; Start-Process build\windows\x64\runner\Release\run_companion.exe

tasks.label: check and replace icons
tasks.command:
python -c "
import os
from PIL import Image
from datetime import datetime

src = r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\MLE.png'
img = Image.open(src)
print(f'Image size: {img.size}, modified: {os.path.getmtime(src)}')
img = img.convert('RGBA')

# Windows ICO
img.save(r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\windows\\runner\\resources\\app_icon.ico', format='ICO', sizes=[(16,16),(32,32),(48,48),(64,64),(128,128),(256,256)])
print('Windows ICO done')

# Android mipmaps
base = r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\android\\app\\src\\main\\res'
for folder, size in [('mipmap-mdpi',48),('mipmap-hdpi',72),('mipmap-xhdpi',96),('mipmap-xxhdpi',144),('mipmap-xxxhdpi',192)]:
    img.resize((size,size), Image.LANCZOS).save(os.path.join(base, folder, 'ic_launcher.png'))
print('Android done')

# iOS
ios = r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\ios\\Runner\\Assets.xcassets\\AppIcon.appiconset'
for s in [20,29,40,58,60,76,80,87,120,152,167,180,1024]:
    img.resize((s,s), Image.LANCZOS).save(os.path.join(ios, f'Icon-App-{s}x{s}@1x.png'))
print('iOS done')

# macOS
macos = r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\macos\\Runner\\Assets.xcassets\\AppIcon.appiconset'
for name, size in [('app_icon_16',16),('app_icon_32',32),('app_icon_64',64),('app_icon_128',128),('app_icon_256',256),('app_icon_512',512),('app_icon_1024',1024)]:
    img.resize((size,size), Image.LANCZOS).save(os.path.join(macos, f'{name}.png'))
print('macOS done')

# Web icons
web = r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\web'
img.resize((16,16), Image.LANCZOS).save(os.path.join(web, 'favicon.png'))
for s in [192,512]:
    img.resize((s,s), Image.LANCZOS).save(os.path.join(web, 'icons', f'Icon-{s}.png'))
    img.resize((s,s), Image.LANCZOS).save(os.path.join(web, 'icons', f'Icon-maskable-{s}.png'))
print('Web done')

# Assets folder
os.makedirs(r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\assets', exist_ok=True)
img.resize((1024,1024), Image.LANCZOS).save(r'C:\\src\\run_companion\\assets\\mle_logo.png')
print('ALL DONE')
"

tasks.label: web build and deploy
tasks.command: flutter build web && firebase deploy --only hosting

tasks.label: rebuild windows after photo change
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Name run_companion -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; flutter build windows; Start-Process build\windows\x64\runner\Release\run_companion.exe
